Phase-3.NAME: Admin control plane and operator visibility
Phase-3.goal: Expose routing policy controls and decision state through admin API and frontend.
Phase-3.step-1: M-016: Add CRUD endpoints for domain rules and decision inspection.
Phase-3.step-2: M-016/M-010: Render policy state in admin frontend.
Phase-3.step-3: M-006/M-016: Add migration-safe analytics for routing state.
